title: Christmas Let it Snow Natural Cotton Ribbon 10yds
description: This lovely ribbon measures 6.3cm in width and 10yds (9.14m) in length. The natural brown ribbon is decorated with white snowflakes and the phrase 'Let it Snow' in red glitter.
